name: Rising Spell Force
desc: Ezreal gains increasing Attack Speed each time he successfully hits a spell, stacking up to 5 times.

name: Mystic Shot
desc: Ezreal fires a damaging bolt of energy which reduces all of his cooldowns slightly if it strikes an enemy unit.

name: Essence Flux
desc: Ezreal fires a fluctuating wave of energy, decreasing the Attack Speed and dealing magic damage to enemy champions, while healing and increasing the Attack Speed of allied champions.

name: Arcane Shift
desc: Ezreal teleports to a target nearby location and fires a homing bolt which strikes the nearest enemy unit.

name: Trueshot Barrage
desc: Ezreal channels for 1 second to fire a powerful barrage of energy missiles which do massive damage to each unit they pass through (deals 10% less damage to each unit it passes through).

name: Empowered Bulwark
desc: Increases Singed's <scaleHealth>Health</scaleHealth> by 25 for every 100 Mana he has.

name: Poison Trail
desc: Leaves a trail of poison behind Singed, dealing damage to enemies caught in the path.

name: Mega Adhesive
desc: Throws a vial of mega adhesive on the ground, slowing enemies who walk on it.

name: Fling
desc: Damages target enemy unit and flings them into the air behind Singed.

name: Insanity Potion
desc: Singed drinks a potent brew of chemicals, granting him increased combat stats.

name: Perseverance
desc: If Garen has not recently been struck by damage or enemy abilities, he regenerates a percentage of his total health each second.

name: Decisive Strike
desc: Garen gains a burst of Move Speed, breaking free of all slows affecting him. His next attack strikes a vital area of his foe, dealing bonus damage and silencing them.

name: Courage
desc: Garen performs a dance of death with his sword, dealing damage around him for the duration.

name: Judgment
desc: Garen rapidly spins his sword around his body, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies.

name: Demacian Justice
desc: Garen calls upon the might of Demacia to attempt to execute an enemy champion.

name: Camouflage
desc: If Teemo stands still and takes no actions for a short duration, he becomes Invisible indefinitely. If he's in brush, Teemo can enter and maintain his Invisibility while moving. After leaving Invisibility, Teemo gains the Element of Surprise, increasing his Attack Speed for a few seconds.

name: Blinding Dart
desc: Obscures an enemy's vision with a powerful venom, dealing damage to the target unit and blinding it for the duration.

name: Move Quick
desc: Teemo scampers around, passively increasing his movement speed until he is struck by an enemy champion or turret.  Teemo can sprint to gain bonus movement speed that isn't stopped by being struck for a short time.

name: Toxic Shot
desc: Each of Teemo's attacks will poison the target, dealing damage on impact and each second after for 4 seconds.

name: Noxious Trap
desc: Teemo places an explosive poisonous trap using one of the mushrooms stored in his pack.  If an enemy steps on the trap it will release a poisonous cloud, slowing enemies and damaging them over time.

name: Rebirth
desc: Upon dying, Anivia will revert into an egg. If the egg can survive for six seconds, she is gloriously reborn.

name: Flash Frost
desc: Anivia brings her wings together and summons a sphere of ice that flies towards her opponents, chilling and damaging anyone in its path. When the sphere explodes it does moderate damage in a radius, stunning anyone in the area.

name: Crystallize
desc: Anivia condenses the moisture in the air into an impassable wall of ice to block all movement. The wall only lasts a short duration before it melts.

name: Frostbite
desc: With a flap of her wings, Anivia blasts a freezing gust of wind at her target, dealing a medium amount of damage. If the target has been slowed by an ice effect, the damage they take is doubled.

name: Glacial Storm
desc: Anivia summons a driving rain of ice and hail to damage her enemies and slow their advance.

name: Tailwind
desc: Janna and her allied champions gain 3% increased Movement Speed.

name: Howling Gale
desc: By creating a localized change in pressure and temperature, Janna is able to create a small storm that grows in size with time. She can active the spell again to release the storm. On release this storm will fly towards the direction it was cast in, dealing damage and knocking away any enemies in its path.

name: Zephyr
desc: Janna summons an air elemental that passively increases her Movement Speed and enables her to pass through units. She may also activate this ability to deal damage and slow an enemy's Movement Speed. The passive is lost while this ability is on cooldown.

name: Eye Of The Storm
desc: Janna conjures a defensive gale that shields an ally champion or turret from incoming damage and increases their Attack Damage.

name: Monsoon
desc: Janna surrounds herself in a magical storm, throwing enemies back. After the storm has settled, soothing winds heal nearby allies while the ability is active.

name: Voracity
desc: Champion kills or assists reduce Katarina's cooldowns by 15 seconds.

name: Bouncing Blade
desc: Katarina throws a dagger that bounces from enemy to enemy, dealing magic damage.

name: Sinister Steel
desc: Katarina whirls her daggers around her, dealing magic damage to all enemies in the area. If she hits an enemy Champion, Katarina gains a burst of speed for a short duration.

name: Shunpo
desc: Katarina instantly moves to her target's location and takes reduced damage from enemies for a few seconds. If the target is an enemy, she deals damage.

name: Death Lotus
desc: Katarina becomes a flurry of blades, throwing daggers with unrivaled speed at up to three nearby Champions.

name: Death Defied
desc: Upon dying, Karthus enters a spirit form that allows him to continue casting spells.

name: Lay Waste
desc: Karthus unleashes a delayed blast at a location, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

name: Wall of Pain
desc: Karthus creates a passable screen of leeching energy.  Any enemy units that walk through the screen have their Movement Speed and Magic Resist reduced for a period.

name: Defile
desc: Karthus passively steals energy from his victims, gaining Mana on each kill.  Alternatively, Karthus can surround himself in the souls of his prey, dealing damage to nearby enemies, but quickly draining his own mana.

name: Requiem
desc: After channeling for 3 seconds, Karthus deals damage to all enemy champions.

name: Sunlight
desc: Damaging spells afflict enemies with Sunlight for 3.5 seconds. When allied Champions deal damage to those targets, they consume the Sunlight debuff to deal additional magic damage.

name: Shield of Daybreak
desc: Leona uses her shield to perform her next basic attack, dealing bonus magic damage and stunning the target.

name: Eclipse
desc: Leona raises her shield to gain Armor and Magic Resistance.  When the duration first ends, if there are nearby enemies she will deal magic damage to them and prolong the duration of the effect.

name: Zenith Blade
desc: Leona projects a solar image of her sword, dealing magic damage to all enemies in a line. When the image fades, the last enemy champion struck will be briefly immobilized and Leona will dash to them.

name: Solar Flare
desc: Leona calls down a beam of solar energy, dealing damage to enemies in an area.  Enemies in the center of the area are stunned, while enemies on the outside are slowed.

name: Flurry
desc: After Lee Sin uses an ability, his next 2 basic attacks gain 40% Attack Speed and return 15 Energy each.

name: Sonic Wave / Resonating Strike
desc:
Sonic Wave: Lee Sin projects a discordant wave of sound to locate his enemies, dealing physical damage to the first enemy it encounters. If Sonic Wave hits, Lee Sin can cast Resonating Strike for the next 3 seconds.
Resonating Strike: Lee Sin dashes to the enemy hit by Sonic Wave, dealing physical damage plus 8% of their missing health.

name: Safeguard / Iron Will
desc:
Safeguard: Lee Sin rushes towards a target ally, shielding them both from damage. After using Safeguard, Lee Sin can cast Iron Will for the next 3 seconds.
Iron Will: Lee Sin's intense training allows him to thrive in battle. For 5 seconds, Lee Sin gains Life Steal and Spell Vamp.

name: Tempest / Cripple
desc:
Tempest: Lee Sin smashes the ground sending out a shockwave that deals magic damage and reveals enemy units hit. If Tempest hits an enemy, Lee Sin can cast cripple for the next 3 seconds.
Cripple: Lee Sin cripples nearby enemies revealed by Tempest, reducing their Movement and Attack Speed for 4 seconds. Movement and Attack Speed recover gradually over the duration.

name: Dragon's Rage
desc: Lee Sin performs a powerful roundhouse kick launching his target back, dealing physical damage to the target and any enemies they collide with. Enemies the target collides with are knocked into the air for a short duration. This technique was taught to him by Jesse Perring, although Lee Sin does not kick players off the map.

name: Cursed Touch
desc: Amumu's attacks reduce his target's Magic Resist for 3 seconds.

name: Bandage Toss
desc: Amumu tosses a sticky bandage at a target, stunning and damaging the target while he pulls himself to them.

name: Despair
desc: Overcome by anguish, nearby enemies lose a percentage of their maximum health each second.

name: Tantrum
desc: Permanently reduces the physical damage Amumu would take. Amumu can unleash his rage, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Each time Amumu is hit, the cooldown on Tantrum is reduced.

name: Curse of the Sad Mummy
desc: Amumu entangles surrounding enemy units in bandages, applying his <keywordMajor>Curse</keywordMajor>, damaging and stunning them.

name: Martial Cadence
desc: Jarvan's first basic attack on an enemy deals bonus physical damage based on their current Health. This effect cannot occur again on the same enemy for a few seconds.

name: Dragon Strike
desc: Jarvan IV extends his lance, dealing physical damage and lowering the Armor of all enemies in its path. Additionally, this will pull Jarvan to his Demacian Standard, knocking up enemies in his path.

name: Golden Aegis
desc: Jarvan IV calls upon the ancient kings of Demacia to shield him from harm and slow surrounding enemies.

name: Demacian Standard
desc: Jarvan IV carries the pride of Demacia, passively granting him bonus Attack Speed and Armor. Activating Demacian Standard allows Jarvan IV to place a Demacian flag that deals magic damage on impact and grants Attack Speed to nearby allied champions.

name: Cataclysm
desc: Jarvan IV heroically leaps into battle at a target with such force that he terraforms the surrounding area to create an arena around them.

name: Illumination
desc: Lux's damaging spells charge the target with energy for 6 seconds. Lux's next attack ignites the energy, dealing bonus magic damage (depending on Lux's level) to the target.

name: Light Binding
desc: Lux releases a sphere of light that binds and deals damage to up to two enemy units.

name: Prismatic Barrier
desc: Lux throws her wand and bends the light around any friendly target it touches, protecting them from enemy damage.

name: Lucent Singularity
desc: Fires an anomaly of twisted light to an area, which slows nearby enemies. Lux can detonate it to damage enemies in the area of effect.

name: Finales Funkeln
desc: After gathering energy, Lux fires a beam of light that deals damage to all targets in the area.  In addition, triggers Lux's passive ability and refreshes the Illumination debuff duration.

name: Loaded Dice
desc: Twisted Fate and his allies receive an additional 2 gold per kill.

name: Wild Cards
desc: Twisted Fate throws three cards, dealing damage to each enemy unit they pass through.

name: Pick A Card
desc: Twisted Fate chooses a magic card from his deck, and uses that for his next attack, causing bonus effects.

name: Gate
desc: After channeling, Twisted Fate Teleports to any target location.

name: Destiny
desc: Twisted Fate predicts the fortunes of his foes, revealing and slowing all enemy champions. Gate's channel time is also reduced during this duration.

name: Pix, Faerie Companion
desc: Pix is a wild Faerie that accompanies Lulu. Pix will fire a barrage of magical energy at targets that Lulu attacks.

name: Glitterlance
desc: Pix and Lulu each fire a bolt of magical energy that heavily slows all enemies it hits. An enemy can only be damaged by one bolt.

name: Whimsy
desc: If cast on an ally, grants them movement speed and ability power for a short time. If cast on an enemy, turns them into an adorable critter that can't attack or cast spells.

name: Help, Pix!
desc: If cast on an ally, commands Pix to jump to an ally and shield them. He then follows them and aids their attacks. If cast on an enemy, commands Pix to jump to an enemy and damage them. He then follows them and grants you vision of that enemy.

name: Wild Growth
desc: Lulu enlarges an ally, knocking nearby enemies into the air and granting the ally a large amount of bonus health. For the next few seconds, that ally gains an aura that slows nearby enemies.

name: Equilibrium
desc: Veigar's mana regeneration increases by 1% for each 1% of mana missing.

name: Baleful Strike
desc: Unleashes dark energy at target enemy, dealing magic damage. If a unit is killed, Veigar gains some Ability Power permanently.

name: Dark Matter
desc: Veigar calls a great mass of dark matter to fall from the sky to the target location, dealing magic damage when it lands.

name: Event Horizon
desc: Veigar twists the edges of space around the target location for 3 seconds, stunning enemies who pass through the perimeter for a short duration.

name: Primordial Burst
desc: Blasts target enemy champion, dealing a large base amount of magic damage plus 80% of his target's AP.

name: Fleet of Foot
desc: Sivir gains a short burst of Movement Speed when she attacks an enemy champion.

name: Boomerang Blade
desc: Sivir hurls her crossblade like a boomerang, dealing damage each way.

name: Ricochet
desc: Sivir's next basic attack will bounce between targets, dealing reduced damage with each successive hit.

name: Spell Shield
desc: Sivir creates a magical barrier on herself that blocks a single enemy ability. She regains Mana if an ability is successfully blocked.

name: On The Hunt
desc: Sivir leads her allies into battle granting them increased Movement and Attack Speeds for a period of time.

name: Prowl
desc: Moving through brush increases Nidalee's Movement Speed by 15% for 2 seconds.

name: Javelin Toss / Takedown
desc: In human form, Nidalee throws a spiked javelin at her target that gains damage as it flies.  As a cougar, her next attack will attempt to fatally wound her target, dealing more damage the less life they have.

name: Bushwhack / Pounce
desc: In human form, Nidalee lays a damaging trap for unwary opponents that, when sprung, reveals the target and reduces their Armor and Magic Resist for 12 seconds. As a cougar, she pounces forward, dealing a small amount of damage when she lands.

name: Primal Surge / Swipe
desc: In human form, Nidalee channels the spirit of the cougar to heal her allies and imbue them with attack speed for a short duration.  As a cougar, she rapidly claws enemies in front of her.

name: Aspect Of The Cougar
desc: Nidalee transforms into a cougar, gaining new abilities and increased Movement Speed.

name: Granite Shield
desc: Malphite is shielded by a layer of rock which absorbs damage up to 10% of his maximum Health. If Malphite has not been hit for 10 seconds, this effect recharges.

name: Seismic Shard
desc: Using his primal elemental magic, Malphite sends a shard of the earth through the ground at his foe, dealing damage upon impact and stealing movement speed for 4 seconds.

name: Brutal Strikes
desc: Malphite starts to hit with such force that his attacks deal damage to all units in front of him. Activating Brutal Strikes greatly increases his Armor and Attack Damage for a short amount of time.

name: Ground Slam
desc: Malphite slams the ground sending out a shockwave that deals magic damage based on his Armor as damage and reduces the Attack speed of enemies for a short duration.

name: Unstoppable Force
desc: Malphite ferociously charges to a location, damaging enemies and knocking them into the air.

name: Focus
desc: Ashe gains stacks of <spellName>Focus</spellName> while out-of-combat. When Ashe has 100 stacks of <spellName>Focus</spellName>, her next basic Attack will critically strike.

name: Frost Shot
desc: While active, each of Ashe's basic attacks slow her targets. This drains Mana with each attack.

name: Volley
desc: Ashe fires 7 arrows in a cone for increased damage.  Volley also applies Ashe's current level of Frost Shot.

name: Hawkshot
desc: Each time Ashe kills a unit, she gains some extra gold. Ashe can activate to send her Hawk Spirit on a scouting mission.

name: Enchanted Crystal Arrow
desc: Ashe fires a missile of ice in a straight line.  If the arrow collides with an enemy Champion, it deals damage and stuns the Champion for up to 3.5 seconds, based on how far the arrow has traveled.  In addition, surrounding enemy units take damage and are slowed.

name: Double Strike
desc: Master Yi occassionaly strikes twice.

name: Alpha Strike
desc: Master Yi leaps across the battlefield with blinding speed, dealing physical damage to multiple units in his path. Alpha strike can critically strike and deals bonus physical damage to minions and monsters. Basic attacks reduce Alpha Strike's cooldown.

name: Meditate
desc: Master Yi rejuvenates his body by focus of mind, restoring Health and taking reduced damage for a short time.

name: Wuju Style
desc: Master Yi becomes skilled in the art of Wuju, passively increasing his Attack Damage.  Activating Wuju Style grants bonus true damage on basic attacks, but the passive bonus is then lost while on cooldown.

name: Highlander
desc: Master Yi moves with unparalleled agility, temporarily increasing his Movement and Attack speeds as well as making him immune to all slowing effects. While active, Champion kills or assists extends Highlander's duration. Passively reduces cooldown for his other abilities on a kill or assist.

name: Gemcraft
desc: Taric loves to socket magical gems into all of his weapons, resulting in his basic attacks dealing bonus magic damage based on his maximum Mana.

name: Imbue
desc: Taric brings forth earthen energy to heal an ally and himself. This heal is more potent when Taric heals only himself. Additionally,Taric's basic attacks reduce Imbue's cooldown.

name: Shatter
desc: Taric is protected by a hardening aura, increasing the Armor of himself and nearby allied champions. He may choose to splinter the enchanted rocks surrounding him to deal damage and decrease the Armor of nearby enemies at the cost of some Armor for a short time.

name: Dazzle
desc: Taric emits a brilliant ball of prismatic light from his gemmed shield, stunning his target and damaging them based on how close he is to them.

name: Radiance
desc: Taric slams his hammer into the ground to deal damage to nearby enemies. For a time after, Taric's gems radiate energy empowering Taric and his allies with bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power

name: Mana Barrier
desc: When Blitzcrank life is brought below 20% health they activate Mana Barrier. This creates a mana shield equal to 50% of their mana for 10 seconds. Mana Barrier can only occur once every 90 seconds.

name: Rocket Grab
desc: Blitzcrank fires their right hand to grab an opponent on its path, dealing damage and dragging it back to them.

name: Overdrive
desc: Blitzcrank supercharges themself to get dramatically increased movement and attack speed.

name: Power Fist
desc: Blitzcrank charges up their fist to make their next attack deal double damage and pop their target up in the air.

name: Static Field
desc: Passively causes lightning bolts to damage a nearby enemy. Additionally, Blitzcrank can activate this ability to damage nearby enemies and silence them for 0.5 seconds, but doing so removes the passive lightning until Static Field becomes available again.

name: Strut
desc: After 5 seconds of not being attacked, Miss Fortune gains an additional <speed>25 Movement Speed</speed>. This bonus increases by 9 each second up to a maximum bonus of 70.

name: Double Up
desc: Miss Fortune fires a bullet at an enemy, damaging them and a target behind them.

name: Impure Shots
desc: Miss Fortune passively increases damage dealt to a target with each strike.  This ability can be activated to increase Miss Fortune's Attack Speed and cause her attacks to lower healing received by the target.

name: Make It Rain
desc: Miss Fortune unleashes a flurry of bullets at a location, dealing waves of damage to opponents and slowing them.

name: Bullet Time
desc: Miss Fortune channels a flurry of bullets into a cone in front of her, dealing large amounts of damage to enemies.

name: Grog-Soaked Blade
desc: Gangplank's attacks apply a poison that deals magic damage per second, increasing with level.

name: Parrrley
desc: Gangplank takes aim and shoots an enemy unit with his pistol. If Parrrley deals a killing blow, he gains extra gold and half the mana cost is refunded.

name: Remove Scurvy
desc: Consumes a large quantity of citrus fruit which clears any crowd control effects on him and heals him.

name: Raise Morale
desc: Gangplank fires a shot into the air, increasing nearby allied champions' attack damage and movement speed.

name: Cannon Barrage
desc: Gangplank signals his ship to fire upon an area for 7 seconds, slowing enemies and dealing damage in random locations within the area.

name: Draw a Bead
desc: Increases Tristana's attack range as she levels.

name: Rapid Fire
desc: Tristana fires her weapon rapidly, increasing her attack speed for a short time.

name: Rocket Jump
desc: Tristana fires at the ground to propel herself to a distant location, dealing damage and slowing surrounding units for 3 seconds where she lands.

name: Explosive Shot
desc: When Tristana kills a unit, her cannonballs burst into shrapnel, dealing damage to surrounding enemies.  Can be activated to deal damage to target unit over time, and reduce healing received.

name: Buster Shot
desc: Tristana loads a massive cannonball into her weapon and fires it at an enemy unit. This deals magic damage and knocks the target back.

name: Visionary
desc: Nunu can cast a spell for free after 5 attacks.

name: Consume
desc: Nunu commands the yeti to take a bite out of a target minion or monster, dealing heavy damage to it and healing himself.

name: Blood Boil
desc: Nunu invigorates himself and an allied unit by heating their blood, increasing their Movement and Attack Speeds.

name: Ice Blast
desc: Nunu launches a ball of ice at an enemy unit, dealing damage and temporarily slowing their Movement and Attack Speeds.

name: Absolute Zero
desc: Nunu begins to sap the area of heat, slowing all nearby enemies. When the spell ends, he deals massive damage to all enemies caught in the area.

name: Feel No Pain
desc: Sion has a 40% chance to ignore up to 30/40/50 damage each time he is attacked.

name: Cryptic Gaze
desc: Sion's stare terrifies a single enemy, dealing damage and stunning them.

name: Death's Caress
desc: Sion surrounds himself with a damage-absorbing shield.  If the shield is not destroyed in 10 seconds then it will explode, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Cast again after 4 seconds to manually detonate.

name: Enrage
desc: While active Sion gains Attack Damage at the cost of Health on each basic attack. Additonally, he permanently increases his maximum Health whenever he kills a unit.

name: Cannibalism
desc: Sion consumes some of his enemies' life force on each attack, leeching health to himself and nearby allies. The smell of flesh also renews Sion's fervor, increasing his Attack Speed.

name: Backstab
desc: Shaco deals 20% bonus damage when striking a unit from behind.

name: Deceive
desc: Shaco becomes invisible and teleports to target location. His next attack is guaranteed to critically strike.

name: Jack In The Box
desc: Shaco creates an animated Jack-in-the-Box at target location, which will wait, invisible, to Fear nearby units and attack them when some come nearby.

name: Two-Shiv Poison
desc: Shaco's Shivs passively poison targets on hit, slowing them and applying a miss chance to minions. He can throw his Shivs to deal damage and poison the target.

name: Hallucinate
desc: Shaco creates an illusion of himself near him, which can attack nearby enemies. Upon death, it explodes, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

name: Soul Eater
desc: Nasus drains his foe's spiritual energy, giving him bonus Lifesteal.

name: Siphoning Strike
desc: Nasus strikes his foe, dealing damage and increasing the power of his future Siphoning Strikes if he slays his target.

name: Wither
desc: Nasus ages his target, decelerating their Movement and Attack Speeds over time.

name: Spirit Fire
desc: Nasus unleashes a spirit flame at a location, dealing damage and reducing the Armor of enemies who stand on it.

name: Fury of the Sands
desc: Nasus unleashes a mighty sandstorm that batters nearby enemies. While the storm rages, he gains increased Health, Attack Range, cast ranges, and drains nearby enemies' max Health converting into bonus damage for the duration.

name: Pyromania
desc: After casting 4 spells, Annie's next offensive spell Stuns the target(s) for 1.75 seconds.

name: Disintegrate
desc: Annie hurls a mana-infused fireball, dealing damage and refunding the mana cost if it destroys the target.

name: Incinerate
desc: Annie casts a blazing cone of fire, dealing damage to all enemies in the area.

name: Molten Shield
desc: Increases Annie's Armor and Magic Resist and damages enemies who hit Annie with basic attacks.

name: Summon: Tibbers
desc: Annie wills her bear Tibbers to life, dealing damage to units in the area. Tibbers can attack and also burns enemies that stand near him.

name: Battle Fury
desc: Tryndamere gains bonus critical strike chance, increased by his missing Health.

name: Bloodlust
desc: Tryndamere thrives on the thrills of combat, gaining Fury that increasing his Attack and Critical Strike Damage as he kills enemies and deals critical strikes. He can cast Bloodlust to consume his Fury and heal himself.

name: Mocking Shout
desc: Tryndamere mocks nearby champions for their cowardice, reducing their Attack Damage. Enemies with their backs turned to Tryndamere also have their Movement Speed reduced.

name: Spinning Slash
desc: Tryndamere slices toward a target unit, dealing damage to enemies in his path.

name: Undying Rage
desc: Tryndamere's lust for battle becomes so strong that he is unable to die, no matter how wounded he becomes.

name: Consecration
desc: Increases surrounding allies' Magic Resist by 16.

name: Starcall
desc: A shower of stars falls from the sky, striking all nearby enemies for magic damage and reducing their Magic Resist for a short duration.

name: Astral Blessing
desc: Soraka blesses a friendly unit, restoring health and increasing Armor for a short time.

name: Infuse
desc: Restores Mana to an ally, or deals damage to an enemy and silences them for a short duration.

name: Wish
desc: Soraka fills her allies with hope, instantly restoring health to herself and all friendly champions.

name: Essence Theft
desc: Gains a charge of Essence Theft whenever a spell hits an enemy. Upon reaching maximum charges, the next spell restores Ahri's Health.

name: Orb of Deception
desc: Ahri sends out and pulls back her orb, dealing magic damage on the way out and true damage on the way back.

name: Fox-Fire
desc: Ahri releases three fox-fires, that lock onto and attack nearby enemies.

name: Charm
desc: Ahri blows a kiss that damages and Charms the first enemy hit. They also take more damage from her for several seconds.

name: Spirit Rush
desc: Ahri dashes forward and fires essence bolts, damaging 3 nearby enemies (prioritizes Champions). Spirit Rush can be cast up to three times before going on cooldown.

name: Shadow Walk
desc: When out of combat, Evelynn enters Camoflauge only being able to be seen by nearby enemy champions or true sight. While stealthed, she rapidly regenerates Mana.

name: Hate Spike
desc: Evelynn fires a line of spikes through an enemy, dealing damage to all enemies in its path.

name: Dark Frenzy
desc: Evelynn passively increases her Movement Speed when hitting enemy champions with her spells. Upon activation, Evelynn breaks free from slows affecting her and gains a massive Movement Speed boost for a short duration.

name: Ravage
desc: Evelynn slashes her target twice, dealing damage with each hit. She then gains increased Attack Speed for a short duration.

name: Agony's Embrace
desc: Evelynn summons spikes from the ground to deal damage and slow enemies in the area. She then gains a shield based on how many enemy champions were hit.

name: Eternal Thirst
desc: Each of Warwick's attacks will heal him. Each successive attack against the same target will steal more and more Health.

name: Hungering Strike
desc: Takes a bite out of an enemy unit and heals Warwick.

name: Hunter's Call
desc: Warwick lets out a howl, increasing all friendly champions' Attack Speed for a short time.

name: Blood Scent
desc: Warwick passively senses weakened enemy champions around him.  The scent of blood sends him into a fury, causing him to move at incredible speeds.

name: Infinite Duress
desc: Warwick lunges at an enemy champion, suppressing his target and dealing magic damage for a few seconds.

name: Spiked Shell
desc: Rammus gains additional damage as his shell becomes reinforced, converting 25% of his armor into Attack Damage.

name: Powerball
desc: Rammus accelerates in a ball towards his enemies, dealing damage and slowing targets affected by the impact.

name: Defensive Ball Curl
desc: Rammus goes into a defensive formation, vastly increasing his armor and magic resistance, while returning damage to attacks.

name: Puncturing Taunt
desc: Rammus taunts an enemy champion or monster into a reckless assault against Rammus' hard shell, reducing Armor temporarily.

name: Tremors
desc: Rammus creates waves of destruction pulsing through the ground, causing damage to units and structures near him.

name: Trample
desc: Each time Alistar casts a spell, he Tramples nearby units and turrets for a few seconds, dealing damage to units he walks over.

name: Pulverize
desc: Alistar smashes the ground, dealing damage to all nearby enemies and tossing them into the air. On landing, enemies are stunned.

name: Headbutt
desc: Alistar rams a target with his head, dealing damage and knocking the target back.

name: Triumphant Roar
desc: Alistar lets out a commanding war cry, restoring health to himself and nearby allies. Nearby enemy deaths reduce the cooldown.

name: Unbreakable Will
desc: Alistar lets out a wild roar, gaining bonus damage, removing all crowd-control effects on himself, and reducing incoming physical and magical damage for the duration.

name: Hextech Shrapnel Shells
desc: Corki's basic attacks deal bonus true damage to minions, monsters, and champions.

name: Phosphorus Bomb
desc: Corki fires a flash bomb at a target location. This attack reveals non-stealthed units around the blast and champions for 6 seconds.

name: Valkyrie
desc: Corki surges to target location, dropping bombs that create a trail of destruction for opponents who remain in the fire.

name: Gatling Gun
desc: Corki's gatling gun rapidly fires in a cone in front of him, dealing damage and reducing enemy armor.

name: Missile Barrage
desc: Corki fires a missile toward his target location that explodes on impact, dealing damage to enemies in an area. Corki stores one missile every 12 seconds up to 7 missiles total. Every 3rd missile will be a Big One, dealing extra damage.

name: Equipment Mastery
desc: Jax's gains bonus Health based on his bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power from items.

name: Leap Strike
desc: Jax leaps and strikes.

name: Empower
desc: Jax's next attack or Leap Strike deals bonus damage and damages nearby enemies.

name: Counter Strike
desc: Jax enters a defensive stance, dodging all incoming basic attacks and taking less damage from area of effect abilities. Then he stuns surrounding enemies and damages them.

name: Grandmaster's Might
desc: Jax gains attack speed when he strikes. Every third consecutive attack deals bonus damage.

name: Arcane Mastery
desc: Ryze's abilities reduce the cooldown of all other abilities.

name: Overload
desc:
Passive: Ryze permanently gains Cooldown Reduction.

Active: Ryze unleashes an orb of energy, dealing magic damage to his target.

name: Rune Prison
desc: Ryze magically imprisons an enemy, <status>rooting</status> them and dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage>.

name: Spell Flux
desc: Ryze fires a chaotic bolt of magic that can bounce between enemies, dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> and reducing their <scaleMR>Magic Resist</scaleMR>.

name: Desperate Power
desc: Ryze temporary harnesses his full powers, gaining <magicDamage>area of effect damage</magicDamage> on all abilities, <healing>Spell Vamp</healing>, and <speed>Move Speed</speed> for a short time.

name: Happy Hour
desc: On ability use, Gragas takes a drink, restoring some of his Health.

name: Barrel Roll
desc: Gragas rolls a barrel that explodes after a short delay, damaging and slowing Attack Speed. Recast to detonate the barrel early.

name: Drunken Rage
desc: Gragas guzzles down brew from his cask, restoring Mana. He then gains Attack Damage and reduces damage taken for several seconds.

name: Body Slam
desc: Gragas charges forward, colliding with the first enemy, damaging nearby enemies and Slowing them.

name: Explosive Cask
desc: Gragas hurls his cask, damaging and Knocking Away enemies from the impact.

name: Deadly Venom
desc: Twitch's basic attacks infect the target, dealing magic damage each second.

name: Ambush
desc: Twitch turns Invisible for several seconds, gaining Move Speed. He then gains Attack Speed after coming out of Invisibility.

name: Venom Cask
desc: Twitch hurls a cask of venom that explodes, inflicting Deadly Venom and slowing enemies in the area.

name: Expunge
desc: All nearby enemies secrete Twitch's toxic venoms from their bodies, dealing damage for each stack.

name: Spray and Pray
desc: Twitch closes his eyes and fires his crossbow, rapidly spraying powerful piercing bolts ahead of him.

name: Dread
desc: Nearby enemies have reduced Magic Resist.

name: Terrify
desc: Strikes a target unit with fear, causing it to flee in terror for a duration.

name: Drain
desc: Fiddlesticks saps the life force of an enemy, dealing damage to a target over time and healing himself.

name: Dark Wind
desc: A wisp of wind strikes an enemy unit and then bounces to nearby enemy units, dealing damage and silencing the victims.

name: Crowstorm
desc: A murder of crows flock wildly around Fiddlesticks, dealing damage each second to all enemy units in the area.

name: Heightened Learning
desc: Zilean and his allies gain additional experience.

name: Time Bomb
desc: Zilean places a time bomb on his target, which damages nearby enemies once it expires.

name: Rewind
desc: Zilean reduces all of his other cooldowns.

name: Time Warp
desc: Zilean increases an allied Champion's movement speed or slows an enemy champion.

name: Chronoshift
desc: Zilean marks himself or an allied champion with a protective time rune. If they would take lethal damage, they are instead transported back in time and healed.

name: Void Stone
desc: Kassadin takes 15% reduced <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> and transforms this damage into bonus <attackSpeed>Attack Speed</attackSpeed>.

name: Null Sphere
desc: Kassadin fires an ethereal bolt of void energy, dealing damage and silencing the target for a duration.

name: Nether Blade
desc: Passive: Kassadin's basic attacks restore Mana. The Mana restored is tripled against enemy champions. Active: Kassadin's basic attacks deal additional magic damage.

name: Force Pulse
desc: Kassadin draws energy from spells cast in his vicinity. Upon charging up, Kassadin can use Force Pulse to damage and slow enemies in a cone in front of him.

name: Riftwalk
desc: Kassadin teleports to a nearby location dealing damage to nearby enemy units. Additionally, multiple Riftwalks in a short period of time cause them to cost additional Mana and deal additional damage.

name: Adrenaline Rush
desc: Dr. Mundo regenerates 0.3% of his maximum Health each second.

name: Infected Cleaver
desc: Dr. Mundo hurls his cleaver, dealing damage based on his victims maximum health.

name: Burning Agony
desc: Dr. Mundo drains his health to reduce the duration of disables and deal continual damage to nearby enemies.

name: Masochism
desc: Masochism increases Dr. Mundo's Attack Damage by a flat amount for 5 second. In addition, Dr. Mundo also gains an additional amount of Attack Damage for each percentage of Health he is missing.

name: Sadism
desc: Dr. Mundo sacrifices a portion of his Health for increased Movement Speed and drastically increased Health Regeneration.

name: Holy Fervor
desc: Kayle gains a percentage of her Ability Power as Attack damage and a percentage of her Attack Damage as Ability Power.

name: Reckoning
desc: Kayle blasts a target, dealing damage, slowing their movement speed, and applying a stack of Holy Fervor.

name: Divine Blessing
desc: Kayle blesses an allied champion, increasing their movement speed and healing them.

name: Righteous Fury
desc: Kayle increases her attack range and her basic attacks deals additional damage to her target and nearby enemies.

name: Intervention
desc: Bathes Kayle's target in a holy light, rendering them immune to all damage for a short time.

name: Carnivore
desc: Whenever Cho'Gath kills a unit, he recovers health and mana. The values restored increase with Cho'Gath's level.

name: Rupture
desc: Ruptures the ground at target location, popping enemy units into the air, dealing damage and slowing them.

name: Feral Scream
desc: Cho'Gath unleashes a terrible scream at enemies in a cone, dealing magic damage and Silencing enemies for a few seconds.

name: Vorpal Spikes
desc: Cho'Gath's attacks passively release deadly spikes, dealing damage to all enemy units in front of him.

name: Feast
desc: Devours an enemy unit, dealing a high amount of true damage. If the target is killed, Cho'Gath grows, gaining maximum health (maximum 6 stacks). Cho'Gath loses half of his stacks upon death.

name: Soul Siphon
desc: Morgana has Spell Vamp, healing herself whenever she deals damage with her spells.

name: Dark Binding
desc: Morgana releases a sphere of dark magic.  Upon contact with an enemy unit, the sphere will deal magic damage and force the unit to the ground for a period of time.

name: Tormented Soil
desc: Infects an area with desecrated soil, causing enemy units who stand on the location to take continual damage.

name: Black Shield
desc: Places a protective barrier around an allied champion, absorbing magical damage and disables until penetrated or the shield dissipates.

name: Soul Shackles
desc: Latches chains of energy onto nearby enemy champions, dealing initial damage to them and slowing their Movement Speed, and then echoing the pain a few seconds later and stunning them if they remain close to Morgana.

name: Techmaturgical Repair Bots
desc: Heimerdinger gives nearby allied Turrets and Champions increased Health Regeneration.

name: H-28G Evolution Turret
desc: Heimerdinger lays down a machine gun turret. Turrets gain abilities as this skill is increased. (Turrets deal half damage to towers).

name: Hextech Micro-Rockets
desc: Heimerdinger fires long-range rockets that hit the enemies closest to Heimerdinger.

name: CH-1 Concussion Grenade
desc: Heimerdinger lobs a grenade at a location, dealing damage to enemy units as well as stunning anyone directly hit and blinding surrounding units.

name: UPGRADE!!!
desc: Passive / Active: Passively increases Cooldown Reduction.  Activate to heal all active Evolution Turrets and cause them to fire frost shots, which reduce Movement Speed, for a short time.

name: Night Hunter
desc: Vayne ruthlessly hunts evil-doers. She gains 30 Movement Speed when moving toward nearby enemy champions.

name: Tumble
desc: Vayne tumbles, maneuvering to carefully place her next shot.  Her next attack deals bonus damage.

name: Silver Bolts
desc: Vayne tips her bolts with a rare metal, toxic to evil things.  The third consecutive attack or ability against the same target deals a percentage of the target's maximum Health as bonus true damage. (Max: 200 damage vs. Monsters)

name: Condemn
desc: Vayne draws a heavy crossbow from her back, and fires a huge bolt at her target, dealing damage and knocking them back.  If they collide with terrain, they are impaled, dealing bonus damage and stunning them.

name: Final Hour
desc: Readying herself for an epic confrontation, Vayne gains increased Attack Damage, invisibility during Tumble, and triple the bonus Movement Speed from Night Hunter.

name: Aegis Protection
desc: After attacking or casting spells 4 times, Pantheon will block the next incoming basic attack or turret attack.

name: Spear Shot
desc: Pantheon hurls his spear at an opponent, dealing damage.

name: Aegis of Zeonia
desc: Pantheon leaps at an enemy and bashes the enemy with his shield, stunning them.  After finishing the attack, Pantheon readies himself to block the next attack.

name: Heartseeker Strike
desc: Pantheon focuses and unleashes 3 swift strikes to the area in front of him, dealing double damage to champions. Pantheon also becomes more aware of his enemy's vital spots, allowing him to always crit enemies below 15% health.

name: Grand Skyfall
desc: Pantheon composes himself and then leaps into the air to a target, striking all enemy units in an area. Enemies closer to the impact point take more damage.

name: Power Chord
desc: After casting 3 spells, Sona's next attack deals bonus magic damage.

name: Hymn of Valor
desc: Sona plays the Hymn of Valor, granting nearby allied champions bonus Damage and Ability Power. Additionally, casting this ability sends out bolts of sound, dealing magic damage to the nearest two enemy champions or monsters.

name: Aria of Perseverance
desc: Sona plays the Aria of Perseverance, granting nearby allied champions bonus Armor and Magic Resist. Additionally, casting this ability sends out healing melodies, healing Sona and a nearby wounded ally.

name: Song of Celerity
desc: Sona plays the Song of Celerity, granting nearby allied champions bonus Movement Speed. Additionally, casting this ability energizes nearby allies with a burst of speed.

name: Crescendo
desc: Sona plays her ultimate chord, forcing enemy champions to dance and dealing magic damage to them.

name: Energize
desc: Basic attacks lower all ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds. Double effect when attacking champions.

name: Crystal Slash
desc: Skarner lashes out with his claws, dealing physical damage to all nearby enemies and charging himself with Crystal Energy for several seconds if a unit is struck.  If he casts Crystal Slash again while powered by Crystal Energy, he deals bonus magic damage and slows all targets hit.

name: Crystalline Exoskeleton
desc: Skarner gains a shield, and while the shield persists his movement speed and attack speed are both increased.

name: Fracture
desc: Skarner summons a blast of crystalline energy which deals damage to enemies struck and marks them. Striking enemies will consume the mark to heal Skarner. Killing targets outright will also activate the heal.

name: Impale
desc: Skarner suppresses an enemy champion and deals magic damage to it.  During this time, Skarner can move freely and will drag his helpless victim around with him.  When the effect ends, Skarner's target will be dealt additional damage.

name: Icathian Surprise
desc: Upon dying, Kog'Maw starts a chain reaction in his body which causes him to detonate after 4 seconds; dealing magic damage to surrounding enemies.

name: Caustic Spittle
desc:
Passive: Increases Kog'Maw's Attack Speed.

Active: Kog'Maw launches a corrosive projectile which deals magic damage and corrodes the target's Armor and Magic Resist for 4 seconds.

name: Bio-Arcane Barrage
desc: Kog'Maw's attacks gain range and deal a percent of the target's maximum health as magic damage.

name: Void Ooze
desc: Kog'Maw launches a peculiar ooze which damages all enemies it passes through and leaves a trail which slows enemies who stand on it.

name: Living Artillery
desc: Kog'Maw fires a living artillery shell at a great distance dealing damage and revealing targets.  Additionally, multiple Living Artilleries in a short period of time cause them to cost additional mana.

name: Blaze
desc: Brand's spells light his targets ablaze, dealing 8% of their maximum Health in magic damage over 4 seconds.

name: Sear
desc: Brand launches a ball of fire forward that deals magic damage. If the target is ablaze, Sear will stun the target.

name: Pillar of Flame
desc: After a short delay, Brand creates a pillar of flame at a target area, dealing magic damage to enemy units with the area. Units that are ablaze take additional damage

name: Conflagration
desc: Brand conjures a powerful blast at his target, dealing magic damage to them. If the target is ablaze, Conflagration spreads to nearby enemies.

name: Pyroclasm
desc: Brand unleashes a devastating torrent of fire, dealing magic damage each time it bounces. If a target is ablaze, Pyroclasm will priotize champions for the next bounce.

name: Stone Skin
desc: Increases Wukong's armor and magic resistance for each nearby enemy champion.

name: Crushing Blow
desc: Wukong's next attack gains extra range, deals bonus damage, and reduces the enemy's Armor.

name: Decoy
desc: Wukong becomes invisible for 1.5 seconds. An uncontrollable decoy is left behind that will deal magic damage to enemies near it after 1.5 seconds.

name: Nimbus Strike
desc: Wukong dashes toward a target enemy and sends out images to attack up to 2 additional enemies near his target, dealing physical damage to each enemy struck.

name: Cyclone
desc: Wukong's staff grows outward and he spins it around, dealing damage and knocking up enemies. Wukong gains movement speed over the duration of the spell.

name: Summon Voidling
desc: Every few spells, Malzahar summons an uncontrollable Voidling to engage his enemies. Voidlings grow over time, gaining armor, damage, and attack speed.

name: Call of the Void
desc: Malzahar opens up two portals to the Void. After a short delay, they fire projectiles that deal Magic Damage and silence enemy champions.

name: Null Zone
desc: Malzahar creates a zone of negative energy that damages nearby enemies each second.

name: Malefic Visions
desc: Malzahar infects his target's mind, dealing damage over time. If the target dies during this time, the visions pass to a nearby enemy and Malzahar gains mana.

name: Nether Grasp
desc: Malzahar channels the essence of the Void to suppress target champion while dealing magic damage over time.

name: Berserker Rage
desc: Olaf's Attack Speed increases as his Health decreases.

name: Undertow
desc: Olaf throws an axe into the ground at a target location, dealing damage to units it passes through and slowing their movement speed. If Olaf picks up the axe, the ability's cooldown is reduced.

name: Vicious Strikes
desc: Olaf's attack damage is increased, based on his health, and he gains massive lifesteal and spell vamp.

name: Reckless Swing
desc: Olaf attacks with such force that it deals true damage to his target and himself.

name: Ragnarok
desc: Olaf temporarily becomes immune to disables and gains bonus Armor, Magic Resist, and Lethality.
